claude-haiku-4-5-20251001

holomush

CI: PR #128 merged. All GitHub Actions workflows now use Namespace runners (namespace-profile-linux-amd64-4x8) with nscloud-cache-action for Go modules/build cache. Docker QEMU+Buildx removed from release workflow (Namespace provides native multi-arch remote builders). actionlint.yaml added for custom runner label.

Config system epic holomush-eagr: configFile var in root.go is declared but never loaded. All config is CLI flags. No config library in deps. XDG dirs already used for certs/data. --guest-start-location added in PR #116. DATABASE_URL is env-only. Start with brainstorming skill.

Domain terminology: The spatial concept is 'location', NOT 'room'. All code, comments, types, event names, and variable names must use 'location'. Event type is 'location_state' not 'room_state'. Struct prefix is LocationState not RoomState.

Epic 8 sub-spec decomposition: Sub-spec 1 (ConnectRPC adapter + SvelteKit scaffold) DONE via PR #121 + #122. Sub-spec 2a (session persistence) spec DONE at docs/specs/2026-03-19-session-persistence-design.md, branch docs/session-persistence-spec, needs implementation plan then execution. Sub-spec 2b (terminal mode UI) needs spec — terminal+sidebar layout chosen (option B), ANSI truecolor, info sidebar with room/exits/who. Sub-spec 2c (chat mode + channels/DMs) needs spec — Slack-style messages with conversation switcher sidebar (scenes+channels+DMs), separate route from terminal. Key architectural decisions: one session per character with multiple concurrent connections (terminal tab + comms hub tab + telnet), grid presence phasing (visible when terminal/telnet connected, invisible/phased-out when comms-hub only), two-phase login (Authenticate→SelectCharacter with auto-connect prefs), per-role TTL and history caps via ABAC.

Epic 8 web client: sub-spec 1 design complete (PR #120). ConnectRPC adapter in gateway, web-facing proto WebService, SvelteKit at web/ with pnpm, embedded static files with --web-dir override. Next: merge PR #120, then write implementation plan with writing-plans skill. Sub-specs 2 (terminal + chat UX) and 3 (portal) still need design.

Epic 8 web client: sub-spec 1 implementation PR #121 (web-client-adapter branch). 18 commits: CharacterRef refactor, WebService proto, ConnectRPC handler (Login/SendCommand/StreamEvents/Disconnect), event translation, static file server, CORS, HTTP server, gateway integration, SvelteKit scaffold, TS codegen, Playwright E2E, operator docs. Sub-specs 2 (terminal+chat UX) and 3 (portal) still need design.

Event delivery architecture: The in-memory Broadcaster races with gRPC Subscribe setup — events can be broadcast before the subscription exists. Must replace with eventStore.Subscribe (Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY) for live event delivery. MemoryEventStore.Subscribe is a dead stub. Tracked in holomush-eh2s. PR #126 (command-response-events) blocked on this.

Event delivery redesign: PR #127 MERGED to main. Broadcaster deleted. Subscribe handler uses eventStore.Subscribe (LISTEN/NOTIFY) with notification-driven replay and catch-up. Follow-up bead holomush-2t7j tracks LISTEN multiplexer. PR #126 (command-response-events) needs rebase on updated main.

Event delivery redesign: PR #127 on event-delivery-redesign branch. Replaces in-memory Broadcaster with eventStore.Subscribe (LISTEN/NOTIFY) for live event delivery. 8 commits, broadcaster.go deleted, MemoryEventStore.Subscribe made functional with //go:build !integration enforcement. Follow-up bead holomush-2t7j tracks LISTEN multiplexer optimization. Blocks PR #126 (command-response-events).

Gateway boundary invariant: The gateway (cmd/holomush/gateway.go, internal/web/) is a protocol translation layer ONLY. It MUST NOT access WorldService, repositories, or the database directly. All game state queries flow through core server RPCs. The gateway proxies — it does not compute. Added to CLAUDE.md in terminal-ui PR.

PR #126 (command-response-events) MERGED to main. Command output now delivered as events on character stream via LISTEN/NOTIFY. EventTypeCommandResponse added. Telnet gateway handles command_response in sendProtoEvent with drainEvents for quit. Web client renders command_response/command_error. All review findings addressed.

PR #129 merged. Session persistence via sessionStorage. Docker compose stack (compose.yaml + compose.e2e.yaml). Taskfile simplified (40+ → 30 tasks). task dev starts full Docker stack. task test:int replaces test:integration. task test:cover replaces test:coverage. task setup replaces task tools + hooks:install.

PR #130: gateway cert polling. Gateway now polls for TLS certs on startup (500ms intervals, 30s timeout) instead of crashing. Transient errors (file not found) retry; permanent errors (invalid cert) fail immediately. CertPollTimeout on GatewayDeps for test injection. Closes holomush-6pa6, unblocks holomush-pb6j (E2E in Docker).

Sub-spec 2a execution: Epic holomush-qve.16 with 9 chunk beads (.16.1 through .16.9). Plan at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-19-session-persistence.md. Spec at docs/specs/2026-03-19-session-persistence-design.md. Branch: docs/session-persistence-spec. Start by: creating jj workspace, then use subagent-driven-development skill to execute. First ready bead: holomush-qve.16.1 (session package + Store interface). Dependency chain: .16.1→.16.2→.16.3→(.16.4,.16.6)→(.16.5,.16.7,.16.8)→.16.9.
Sub-spec 2a session persistence: PR #123 merged to main as squash commit f1c646e0. Session persistence complete. Next: sub-spec 2b (terminal UI) and 2c (chat mode).
Sub-spec 2a session persistence: PR #123 on session-persistence branch. 17 commits, 9 chunks. All unit tests pass. jj workspace at holomush_worktrees/session-persistence. Epic holomush-qve.16 closed.

Sub-spec 2a session persistence: spec written at docs/specs/2026-03-19-session-persistence-design.md, pushed on docs/session-persistence-spec branch. Next: write implementation plan using writing-plans skill. Key decisions: Postgres-backed sessions, two-phase login (Authenticate→SelectCharacter), multi-connection (terminal+comms hub+telnet on same session), grid presence phasing (invisible when comms-hub only), per-role TTL/history caps via ABAC, auto-connect preferences (last/default/ask), concurrent drain during replay. Sub-specs 2b (terminal UI) and 2c (chat mode + channels/DMs) follow.

Sub-spec 2b terminal UI: PR #125 merged to main. Terminal page at /terminal with EventChannel system, location-following, session-based presence, dark/light themes, collapsible sidebar, Playwright E2E. Next: sub-spec 2c (chat mode + channels/DMs) needs spec.

Sub-spec 2b terminal UI: spec at docs/specs/2026-03-19-terminal-ui-design.md, plan at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-19-terminal-ui.md. Key decisions: ANSI-to-HTML with ansi_up, collapsible right sidebar, client-side semantic rendering with shared theme schema, event channel system (TERMINAL/STATE/BOTH on GameEvent proto), hybrid room_state snapshot + arrive/leave deltas, synthetic room_state on every StreamEvents start, dark+light themes with prefers-color-scheme, Enter=send Shift+Enter=newline, URL auto-linking. 8 chunks: proto, core events, server stream changes, theme+stores, terminal components, sidebar, page+routing, E2E. Bead holomush-qve.5 in_progress.
